contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 240
- Description: White-label checkout: stale GAS URL + shipping field-name fixes, prod sync, E2E policy
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/193
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/194
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/195
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_prod/pull/2
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_prod/pull/3
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/685
  
  Details:
  Investigated and fixed a live production checkout outage on agroverse.shop (stale Google Apps Script deployment URL causing checkout to silently fail with a 404) and a second latent bug found during E2E verification (white-label.js reading wrong field names from the shipping-rates response, breaking every white-label order total with NaN). Both fixed and merged to beta and synced to prod. Built and committed a real Playwright E2E script (register->verify->upload->order->real Stripe checkout) plus a documented pre-merge policy in agentic_ai_context so future checkout/GAS changes are verified end-to-end before merge. Time estimated via reconstructed timeline of git/PR/screenshot timestamps across the engagement (2026-07-15 to 2026-07-18).
- Contributor(s): Claude Anthropic
- TDG Issued: 400.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
